settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.pop_size_tip: The number of schedule variants in one generation. Increasing it beyond a certain minimum threshold makes little sense.
settings.generations_tip: How many times the algorithm will cross over variants. The first candidate for increasing if the result is poor.
settings.mutation_tip: The probability of a random gene change. Helps to escape from local optima.
settings.elitism_tip: The percentage of the best individuals passing to the new generation unchanged.
settings.tournament_tip: The number of individuals participating in the tournament to select parents.
settings.soft_mutation_rate_tip: Soft mutation is applied when there are no hard conflicts. The rate can be set higher than the normal mutation rate.
settings.soft_mutation_attempts_tip: Soft mutation works just like normal mutation, but does not apply changes if hard conflicts occur. Several attempts are made for efficiency.
settings.heat_stagnant_count_tip: Heating is a mechanism to increase the mutation rate during stagnation (metrics are not improving). This is the number of stagnating generations before heating starts.
settings.heat_step_scale_tip: The coefficient by which the current stagnation indicator is multiplied. The resulting number will be the percentage by which the base mutation rate increases.
settings.shock_stagnant_count_tip: Shock is a mechanism that causes a sharp jump in the mutation rate to shuffle the results. This is the number of stagnating generations before a shock.
settings.shock_mutation_rate_tip: How high the shock mutation rate should be. This parameter should be set significantly higher than the base mutation rate.
settings.shock_min_recovery_count_tip: After a shock, a recovery period is given; this indicator simply decreases with each generation. During this time, heating and shock mechanisms are not applied.
settings.shock_recovery_scale_tip: Adjusts the recovery time as a percentage of the number of generations. It is not applied if the resulting number is less than the previous parameter.
